beforeStart.label: before-start
beforeStart.transcriptVisible: Start recording and your words will appear here.
beforeStart.bodyText: Skip to content Private is ready. Nothing leaves your browser. Private / Vault Mode is setting up in this browser. Keep this tab open; your audio stays on your machine. SpeakSharp Home Session Analytics PRO ux-hardnav-1780680159600@speaksharp.app Sign Out Practice Session Record, review, and track your speaking patterns Private ready. Nothing leaves your browser. Trial access: 59m 59s left for Private/Vault Mode. Private Model Complete 100% Runs locally after model setup. All audio processing remains local. • Private 00:00 PRIVATE READY. NOTHING LEAVES YOUR BROWSER. Live Transcript Start recording and your words will appear here. LIVE COACHING SpeakSharp Score* The visible tools roll up into one coaching score: structure, pace/fillers/pauses, clarity, and audience impact. Improve the ingredients, then come back and try to lift the score. Speak a little more to get a useful score. -- SCOR

beforeNav.label: before-hard-nav
beforeNav.transcriptVisible: Draft transcript Text may change before the final transcript is saved.Basically.
beforeNav.bodyText: Skip to content Private is ready. Nothing leaves your browser. SpeakSharp Home Session Analytics PRO ux-hardnav-1780680159600@speaksharp.app Sign Out Practice Session Record, review, and track your speaking patterns Recording active Trial access: 59m 59s left for Private/Vault Mode. Private Model Complete 100% Runs locally after model setup. All audio processing remains local. • Private 00:03 RECORDING ACTIVE MIN 5S REQUIRED Basically. Live Transcript Live text Draft transcript Text may change before the final transcript is saved. Basically. LIVE COACHING SpeakSharp Score* The visible tools roll up into one coaching score: structure, pace/fillers/pauses, clarity, and audience impact. Improve the ingredients, then come back and try to lift the score. Speak a little more to get a useful score. -- SCORE SOON Confidence: Building Getting Started Warming up Try this now Start with one complet

afterNav.label: after-hard-nav
afterNav.bodyText: Skip to content SpeakSharp Home Session Analytics PRO ux-hardnav-1780680159600@speaksharp.app Sign Out Your Analytics Track your speaking progress and improvements Pro active Your trends start after one saved session Save a practice session to see pace, filler words, clarity, PDF reports, and progress history here. Start Practice Session
